channel.title: Burke Museum Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Burke Museum Events

item.title: Trees Experience Alcove
item.description:
Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

Activities for Kids & Families Learn about the diversity and significance of trees with our hands-on activities.

Event details

item.title: Free First Thursday
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

FREE ADMISSION Admission is FREE and the museum is open until 8 p.m. on the first Thursday of every month.

Event details

item.title: Eric-Paul Riege in the Artist Studio
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

Artist studio Visit Diné artist Eric-Paul Riege in the Artist Studio.

Event details

item.title: STEAM Spotlight | Bat Research
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

FREE event on Free First Thursday Learn about bats with researcher Andrea Bernal-Rivera.

Event details

item.title: Burke-ology
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

Fundraising event Join us for our annual spring fundraiser.

Event details

item.title: Microfossil Finds from Hell Creek and Beyond — Webinar
item.description:
Monday, April 20, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

Register your class Learn how paleontologists piece together tiny clues about past ecosystems.

Event details

item.title: Dino Lecture | A New History of a Lost World
item.description:
Friday, April 24, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

SOLD OUT Join Dr. Steve Brusatte as he discusses the rise and fall of dinosaurs.

Event details

item.title: Dino Fest 2026
item.description:
Sunday, April 26, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

Fossil fun for everyone! Dig into paleontology at the Burke’s annual festival of fossils!

Event details

item.title: Fire Humanities | Panel Discussion and Storytelling
item.description:
Thursday, April 30, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

Panel discussion What does it mean to live well as wildfire and smoke season becomes more a part of life?

Event details

item.title: How to Tell a Seabird's Tale: The Role of the Writer and Scientific Illustrator
item.description:
Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

Panel event Join three Pacific Northwest artists — two writers and one illustrator — to learn how they distill their research on our local seabirds into engaging stories and compelling illustrations.

Event details

item.title: Free First Thursday
item.description:
Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

FREE ADMISSION Admission is FREE and the museum is open until 8 p.m. on the first Thursday of every month.

Event details

item.title: Art Workshop: Botanical Sketch Journaling
item.description:
Saturday, May 9, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

art workshop Step into the lush environment of the UW Biology Greenhouse and discover the art of botanical sketch journaling.

Event details

item.title: Author Talk: Street Trees of Seattle
item.description:
Thursday, May 14, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

Book Event Join author Taha Ebrahimi for a book event for Street Trees of Seattle: An Illustrated Walking Guide.

Event details

item.title: Free First Thursday
item.description:
Thursday, June 4, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Burke Museum, 4300 15th Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98105

FREE ADMISSION Admission is FREE and the museum is open until 8 p.m. on the first Thursday of every month.

Event details
